name: Uttapam
desc: Savory rice pancake topped with onion, tomato, and coriander.
steps: Heat a tawa and lightly grease it with oil.
Pour a ladle of batter and spread into a medium circle.
Top with onion, tomato, and coriander.
Cook on medium heat until the base turns golden.
Flip once and cook the other side briefly. Serve hot with chutney.

name: Roti + Bhindi + Salad + Dahi
desc: A balanced everyday plate with soft rotis, spiced okra, fresh salad, and yogurt.
steps: Knead wheat flour into a soft dough and rest it for 10 minutes.
Wash and dry bhindi well, then slice into small pieces.
Cook bhindi with oil and spices until it becomes tender and slightly crisp.
Chop onion, tomato, and cucumber for a simple salad.
Roll and cook rotis on a hot tawa, then serve with bhindi, salad, and dahi.

name: Pav Bhaji
desc: Classic street-style mashed vegetable curry served with buttery pav.
steps: Boil potatoes and mixed vegetables until soft. Mash lightly and keep aside.
Sauté onion in butter until soft, then add tomatoes and pav bhaji masala.
Add the mashed vegetables and cook until thick and well blended.
Butter the pav buns and toast them on a pan until golden.
Serve bhaji hot with pav, chopped onion, and lemon.
